case_title: WILLIAMS, MEGAN HALE et al VS LINDA MONTALVO REALTY AND ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, MEGAN HALE SMITH, MARTIN D AS TO DEFENDANT LINDA MONTALVO REALTY AND ASSOCIATES CONCHITAL LAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
